title: Machine hangs in starting state when interrupted from parent process
body:
### Issue Description

This issue is basically identical to https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/24416. The provided fix for https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/24416 works fine for interruption from the CLI, but the main concern is that the startup command is often run from Podman Desktop. When you quit Dekstop during the startup, the sub-process gets SIGPIPE and machine is left hanging.

Move information can be found in https://github.com/podman-desktop/podman-desktop/issues/9670

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Have a podman machine created on the system but which is stopped.
2. Autostart podman machine preference is enabled in PD.
3. Exit on close preference is enabled in PD.
4. Open podman desktop application.
5. When the podman machine reaches the state of `STARTING` on the dashboard of PD close the PD app.
6. At this point the issue should have occurred, checking the startup in podman CLI or reopening PD app and checking there will show that the podman machine is stuck in starting state.

### Describe the results you received

Machine stuck in STARTING phase.

### Describe the results you expected

Machine running or stopped.

### podman info output

```yaml
Mac
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting
